Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was told to fetch Aigis,[n]but she's not around...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh, the next one up for career consultation...? That'd be Aigis-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}She was just here a second ago, but I guess she went out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Maybe she's on the roof. I've seen her go up there alone every now and then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}So, do you think she's gonna go to college or get a job? She's full of mysteries, isn't she?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}She's changed recently though, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Again with that? Are you ever gonna stop thinking about hitting on girls?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I don't mean it like that! All I'm saying is...[n]{f 1 1}
